title: antidesma fordii
intro: Antidesma fordii, also known as the Chinese five-angled asperuloid or Chinese milk bush, is a plant species native to China. It is a shrub with white flowers and red berries, traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been shown to have potential health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, Antidesma fordii is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions to leverage its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
